projectDescription: A Django-based platform that converts any public JSON or XML API into a fully generated, deployable Django website using AI-driven analysis, field mapping, and code generation.
keyFeatures: AI-powered API analysis: feeds JSON/XML datasets to an LLM that proposes site type, relevant fields, and a structured plan
Step-by-step generation wizard: user reviews and accepts (or regenerates) the LLM plan before code is produced
Full Django project generation: produces models.py, views.py, templates, management commands, Dockerfile, and entrypoint in one pass
Multi-LLM catalog support: swap between Llama 4 Scout (Groq), Llama 3.3 70B, Qwen3 Coder (OpenRouter), or a custom OpenAI-compatible provider
Version control for generated sites: snapshot before every regeneration, browse history, restore or download any past version
n8n automation integration: welcome email on registration and login notification via configurable webhooks
Secure XML/JSON parsing: uses defusedxml + xmltodict for safe XML ingestion
In-browser file editor: modify any generated source file directly from the dashboard before downloading or deploying
publicApiSurface: GET/POST /asistente — Main assistant wizard (URL submission, LLM plan review, plan acceptance)
POST /site/<id>/generate/ — Trigger async Django project generation
GET /site/<id>/download/ — Download generated project as ZIP
POST /site/<id>/deploy/ — Deploy project via n8n webhook
POST /site/<id>/update-file/ — Edit a single generated file in-place
GET /site/<id>/versions/<vid>/download/ — Download a specific version as ZIP
